# SteelR — Bespoke Steel Entrance Doors (Full Reference)

> SteelR is a UK manufacturer and installer of bespoke steel entrance doors. Every door is made to order with full design consultation and professional nationwide installation. SR3 rated, ISO 9001 certified, Secured by Design approved.

## Company Overview

SteelR specialises in manufacturing and installing bespoke steel entrance doors for residential properties across the entire United Kingdom. The company operates under Supply Windows (supplywindows.co.uk) and serves homeowners, architects, developers and specifiers who require a high-security entrance door that combines exceptional aesthetics with the highest physical security standards available.

Every SteelR door is manufactured in the United Kingdom from fire-rated steel. There are no standard sizes and no off-the-shelf finishes. Each door is designed and built to the exact specification of the customer, from the initial consultation through to final installation.

## Product Range

### Contemporary Steel Entrance Doors
Modern designs featuring clean lines, minimal hardware profiles, horizontal ribbing, geometric glazing patterns, bar handles and contemporary finishes. Available in single and double configurations with sidelights and toplights.

### Traditional Steel Entrance Doors
Classic designs featuring ornate detailing, lion head knockers, medallion panels, decorative fanlights, stained glass options, ring knockers and period-appropriate hardware. Suitable for period properties, listed buildings and heritage-sensitive installations.

### Double Steel Entrance Doors
Grand entrance solutions for larger properties featuring symmetrical door pairs, wide openings, coordinated hardware and glazing. Available in both contemporary and traditional styles.

### Customisation Options
- **Colour:** Any RAL colour from the full RAL Classic range
- **Hardware:** Chrome, brass, gold, bronze, black and satin nickel finishes
- **Glazing:** Clear, frosted, tinted, decorative, stained glass and obscured options
- **Panels:** Flat, raised, ribbed, fluted and bespoke moulded profiles
- **Accessories:** Letterboxes, spy holes, knockers, handles, pull bars and numerals
- **Sidelights:** Single and double sidelight configurations
- **Toplights:** Fanlights, rectangular and arched toplight options

## Security Credentials

### SR3 Security Rating
SR3 is the highest level of physical security testing for entrance doors under European standards (BS EN 1627:2011). An SR3-rated door has been tested to withstand sustained, forced attack using heavy-duty tools including crowbars, drills and angle grinders for an extended period. SteelR doors achieve this rating as standard.

### ISO 9001 Certification
SteelR's manufacturing processes are certified to ISO 9001 quality management standards, ensuring consistent quality control from raw material through to finished product.

### Secured by Design
SteelR doors carry Secured by Design accreditation — the official UK police initiative that works to improve the security of buildings and their surroundings. This accreditation is recognised by insurers and provides independent verification of security performance.

### Fire Rating
All SteelR doors are manufactured from fire-rated steel and can be specified to meet fire safety requirements for residential properties, including FD30 and FD60 specifications where required.

## The SteelR Process

### Step 1: Enquiry
Contact SteelR by phone on 0800 861 1450 or through the online enquiry form at steelr.co.uk/contact. The team will discuss your property type, design brief, security requirements and project timeline. There is no obligation and the initial consultation is free.

### Step 2: Survey
A SteelR surveyor visits your property anywhere in the United Kingdom. Full measurements are taken on site and the detailed specification is agreed in person, including door style, colour, hardware, glazing and any bespoke requirements.

### Step 3: Design
Your door is designed to your exact specification. Technical drawings are produced for approval. Colour, hardware, glazing, panel style and finish are confirmed before manufacture begins.

### Step 4: Installation
Professional installation is carried out by SteelR's own installation team (not subcontracted). The typical lead time from initial enquiry to completed installation is 8 to 12 weeks, depending on specification complexity.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is an SR3 security rating?**
SR3 is the highest level of physical security testing for entrance doors under European standards (BS EN 1627:2011). Testing involves sustained forced attack with heavy-duty tools including crowbars, drills and angle grinders. An SR3-rated door must withstand this attack for a specified period without the attacker gaining entry. SteelR doors achieve SR3 as standard, providing the highest commercially available level of forced-entry resistance for a residential entrance door.

**Do you install nationwide?**
Yes. SteelR designs, manufactures and installs bespoke steel entrance doors across the entire United Kingdom, from the Scottish Highlands to the south coast of England. The survey team and installation team travel to your property wherever you are located. There are no regional restrictions or additional travel charges for mainland UK properties.

**How long does the process take?**
From initial enquiry to completed installation, the typical lead time is 8 to 12 weeks. This includes the survey visit, design approval, manufacture and installation. More complex specifications or multi-door projects may require additional time. The team will confirm your specific timeline during the enquiry stage.

**Can I choose any colour and finish?**
Every SteelR door is fully bespoke. You can choose from any colour in the RAL Classic range (over 200 colours), with options for dual-colour specification (different colours inside and outside). Hardware is available in chrome, brass, gold, bronze, black and satin nickel finishes. Glazing, panel styles and decorative elements are all customisable.

**Are your doors fire rated?**
Yes. All SteelR doors are manufactured from fire-rated steel. Doors can be specified to FD30 (30-minute fire resistance) or FD60 (60-minute fire resistance) standards where required by building regulations or customer preference. Fire-rated glazing is also available for doors with glass panels.
